skills.description: Systematic code review: quality gates, OWASP Top 10 security checks, anti-pattern detection, PR diff analysis. Triggers on PR review, code audit, security review, or quality validation.
Full PR lifecycle: branch creation, commit conventions, PR creation via gh CLI, review workflow, and merge strategy. Integrates with Law 40 branch isolation.
Unit and integration test generation for pytest: file/class/method naming, fixtures, parametrize, async tests, monkeypatch, TDD workflow. Triggers on test writing or coverage expansion.
Systematic debugging: stack trace analysis, 5-step hypothesis-driven root cause investigation, bisection debugging, pdb usage, structured logging. Triggers on bug investigation or error analysis.
Coverage-first safe refactoring: extract method, rename/move, DRY consolidation, dependency injection, constants extraction. Triggers on code cleanup, structural improvement, or tech debt reduction.

Framework-agnostic mapping of the 7-role governance architecture to any multi-agent system. Covers role reference, phase-to-role routing, Law 33 single-halt atomicity, Tier 1/2 JSON contract, PROTOCOL hooks, and model tier assignment.
